data.title: FINEOS (ASX:FCL) partners with PwC for modern insurance future, focusing on digital transformation for employee benefits carriers.
data.description: In Atlanta, FINEOS Corporation (ASX:FCL) announced a strategic partnership with PwC to assist insurers in hastening modernization efforts and implementing digital, data-focused transformations throughout the insurance lifecycle. FINEOS, a prominent provider of core systems for employee benefits and life, accident, and health insurance, aims to support carriers in overcoming outdated technology obstacles and meeting growing demands for streamlined digital services. The collaboration with PwC, a well-established consulting firm, seeks to propel the adoption of FINEOS AdminSuite, a cloud-native solution designed to enhance operational efficiency and customer experiences within the insurance industry.

data.title: Illumina finalizes purchase of SomaLogic, boosting expertise in proteomics. Enhances scalability in protein analysis.
data.description: Deeply bolsters its expertise in proteomics and multiomics, enhancing scalability, flexibility, and affordability in protein analysis. The collaboration integrates SomaScan with Illumina's NGS platform, DRAGEN software, and Illumina Connected Multiomics. This strategic partnership aims to revolutionize protein analysis by maximizing efficiency and speed.

data.title: Cambridge Health Group renews partnership with Kozyavkin Medical Group in UAE, expanding neurological rehabilitation for children with cerebral palsy.
data.description: Senior officials and esteemed diplomats celebrated the renewal of a contract in Abu Dhabi, UAE on Jan. 30, 2026. The agreement aims to aid children in the UAE suffering from cerebral palsy and other neurological disorders. Cambridge Health Group, a prominent post-acute care provider in the GCC region, is leading this effort.

data.title: Prosperity Life Group appoints Rona Guymon as President, Retail Life and Annuity. Guymon will drive growth in retail business.
data.description: Prosperity Life Group in New York has appointed Rona Guymon as President of Retail Life and Annuity. In her new role, Guymon will oversee the company's efforts to expand its retail life and annuity business. She will be responsible for managing all retail distribution, national accounts, and marketing initiatives, with a focus on developing competitive products to increase Prosperity's market presence. Guymon will report to Micha.

data.title: Zevo's new Super Bowl campaign empowers fans to trap bugs like a hero with their #1 Flying Insect Trap, redefining MVP.
data.description: In Cincinnati, Zevo, a prominent company in pest solutions, has partnered with Super Bowl LX as the Official Bug Defense Partner. Their latest campaign, "I Need a Zevo," focuses on individuals as the heroes of their homes with the help of Zevo products. A campaign by Curiosity, a creative agency based in Cincinnati, showcases the impact of a single bug disrupting moments at home. By using Zevo's top-rated Flying Insect Trap, individuals can ensure a worry-free defense against insects.

data.title: Tractor Supply donates $250,000 to Winter Storm Recovery Fund in Middle Tennessee via United Way. #TSC #TSCO
data.description: A rural lifestyle retailer based in Brentwood, Tennessee, Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ: TSCO) along with the Tractor Supply Company Foundation, has made a generous contribution of $250,000 to the United Way of Greater Nashville’s Winter Storm Recovery Fund. The donation serves as seed funding aimed at kickstarting recovery initiatives and mobilizing further financial aid in response to the recent severe winter weather in Middle Tennessee. This donation underscores their commitment to supporting the community during challenging times.

data.title: Tompkins Finl (AMEX: TMP) Q4 earnings beat estimates with EPS of $6.7 (294% increase). Revenue up $117.71M YoY. More on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Tompkins Financial (AMEX: TMP) revealed its Q4 financial results on Friday, January 30, 2026, at 09:00 AM. The earnings report reflected noteworthy results, with Tompkins Financial surpassing estimated earnings by an impressive 294.0%, stating an EPS of $6.7 compared to the predicted $1.7. Moreover, the revenue showed a substantial increase of $117.71 million from the corresponding period in the prior year. When reviewing the company's past earnings, there was a miss on EPS by [specific amount not provided]. For a more detailed account, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals beat estimated earnings by 18%, reporting EPS of $11.44 versus $9.69. Revenue up $95M YoY.
data.description: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: REGN) released its Q4 earnings report on Friday, January 30, 2026, at 06:30 AM. The report revealed that the company exceeded estimated earnings by 18.0%, with an EPS of $11.44 compared to the estimated $9.69. Revenue also saw an increase of $95.00 million from the previous year. This positive performance in earnings continues a trend of outperforming expectations. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Franklin Resources (BEN) Q1 earnings beat estimates by 27%, EPS at $0.7, revenue up $75M YoY. Read more on Benzinga.com.
data.description: On Friday, January 30, 2026, at 08:30 AM, Franklin Resources (NYSE: BEN) released its Q1 earnings report. The company surpassed estimated earnings by 27.0%, posting an EPS of $0.7 compared to the expected $0.55. Revenue increased by $75.00 million from the prior year. In terms of past earnings, Franklin Resources consistently outperformed on EPS. Detailed information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Republic Bancorp reported Q4 EPS of $1.17 (missed estimates by -11.0%) and revenue up $3.42 million from last year.
data.description: Republic Bancorp, listed on NASDAQ as RBCAA, disclosed its Q4 financial results on January 30, 2026, at 08:00 AM. The earnings report highlighted a significant miss in estimated earnings by -11.0%, with an EPS of $1.17 compared to the expected $1.31. The revenue showed growth, increasing by $3.42 million from the corresponding period in the prior year. Notably, in the last quarter, the company outperformed expectations on EPS by $0.16. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: UNice Hair marks 10 years of success in premium human hair wigs. Milestone celebrated for innovation, empowerment, and community.
data.description: Recently in Inglewood, California, UNice Hair, a renowned brand in premium human hair wigs and extensions, wrapped up its 10th Anniversary Celebration, signifying ten years of beauty innovation, creator empowerment, and community connection. The significant milestone was honored, highlighting the brand's commitment to these values.

data.title: Scrum Studio and Tokyu Land open applications for 2nd year cohort of Full Bloom, Tokyo-based program for deeptech startups.
data.description: Applications are now being accepted for the second year cohort of Full Bloom, a program based in Tokyo, created by Scrum Studio Inc. and Tokyu Land Corporation. Full Bloom is aimed at supporting deeptech startups that are developing globally scalable businesses at the technology and commerce crossroads. The program offers selected startups a platform to expand and enhance their businesses.

data.title: BofA gives $500,000 grant to FIND Regional Food Bank for expansion and programs in Indio, Calif.
data.description: A grant of $500,000 from Bank of America has been awarded to FIND Regional Food Bank in Indio, California, on January 30, 2026. This grant will assist in completing the capital campaign for a new 40,000 square-foot warehouse. The funding will aid in expanding FIND's operations, enhancing disaster resilience measures, and supporting educational programs.

data.title: Revolve Group, Inc. (NYSE: RVLV) to share Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 24, 2026, after the market close.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, Revolve Group, Inc. (NYSE: RVLV) declared that they are set to disclose their financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and complete year ending on December 31, 2025. The report will be publicized after the market closure on Tuesday, February 24, 2026. Subsequently, there will be a conference call scheduled for 1:30 PM to discuss these results.

data.title: Marriott International unveils elevated romantic experiences at premier Caribbean resorts in PR. Jan. 30, 2026.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, in San Juan, Puerto Rico, Marriott International is setting the standard for romantic travel in the Caribbean. The prestigious resorts are introducing carefully crafted experiences catered to discerning couples. This includes transformative wellness programs and luxurious amenities for a truly unforgettable getaway.

data.title: Cognizant and Adobe partner to revolutionize content creation with AI, targeting enterprise-scale transformation. #CTSH #PRNewswire
data.description: Cognizant, a company listed on the NASDAQ as CTSH, recently revealed a strategic partnership on January 30, 2026, in TEANECK, N.J. The collaboration's goal is to revolutionize content and experiences creation within enterprises by implementing AI-powered content supply chains combined with high-level governance for marketing and customer experience on a large scale.

data.title: Jumo Health launches PRISM™, focusing on patient readiness for clinical trials. New approach to increase completion and predictability.
data.description: Jumo Health, a Patient Experience Organization (PXO), unveiled PRISM™ in New Haven, Connecticut on January 30, 2026. This new approach to trial execution prioritizes patient readiness to enhance completion rates and predictability. The innovative strategy aims to improve the success of clinical trials by focusing on patient readiness as the main factor driving the process.

data.title: Cutting-edge AI is being integrated into everyday life in China, offering efficiency and intelligence similar to "Iron Man's" J.A.R.V.I.S. program as per China.org.cn.
data.description: In a recent news report by China.org.cn on January 30, 2026, it was highlighted that China is making significant strides in the field of artificial intelligence (AI). Drawing a parallel to the popular movie "Iron Man," the report discusses the aspiration for a personal assistant akin to J.A.R.V.I.S. The article underscores the desire for a highly intelligent and efficient AI system. China is actively exploring the application of AI technology across various sectors, showcasing a growing interest in harnessing its capabilities. This development aligns with the global surge in AI integration, indicating a shift towards advanced technological solutions. Such advancements exemplify China's commitment to innovation and efficiency, setting the stage for further exploration of AI's potential.

data.title: Tous les Jours and Rakuten Viki partner for Valentine's Day promo: Free one-month Viki Pass Standard for ad-free access to Asian shows and movies.
data.description: Starting from January 30, 2026, Tous les Jours, a renowned Korean-French bakery, is collaborating with Rakuten Viki to offer a complimentary one-month Viki Pass Standard subscription. This subscription provides ad-free access to Viki's extensive collection of Asian movies and shows. This partnership aims to enhance ordinary moments and transform them into exceptional experiences for viewers.

data.title: ALLSWIFT launches Active5K to make elite-performance running shoes accessible to all runners, focusing on starting, returning, and showing up.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, in New York, a notable shift was observed in the running industry's focus. While the trend so far has been towards longer distances, higher shoe stacks, and grand promises, the real struggle for many runners lies in merely beginning the journey. Rather than aiming for extensive feats, the emphasis now seems to be on overcoming the initial hurdle of starting and re-engaging with the activity. This change signifies a move towards acknowledging the significance of consistent participation in running, instead of fixating on pushing boundaries.
